mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, request_id, total_price, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{requestId}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, request_id, total_price, status, created_at FROM orders WHERE request_id = #{requestId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) FROM orders o JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = #{productId}
